hero.tagline: A bold, rugged compact SUV that blends French design, turbo performance and everyday versatility for Indian roads.

pricing.notes: Variant prices are ex-showroom reference prices (pan-India introductory) from Renault India at launch in March 2026; verify against Renault dealer / city price before publishing final on-road values.

overview.minides: The Duster is back — and it means business. Punchy turbos, rugged French character and a loaded cabin make it the compact SUV to beat in 2026.
overview.description: The third-generation Renault Duster returns to India after years of absence, now on a modern CMF-B platform with two turbo-petrol engines (1.0L and 1.3L), manual and DCT automatic options, and six carefully crafted trim levels from no-nonsense Authentic to the adventure-ready Iconic Launch Edition. It brings Level-2 ADAS, a panoramic sunroof, 5-star Bharat NCAP rating, connected car tech, and a 7-year/1,50,000 km warranty — a segment first. A 1.8L strong hybrid is confirmed for Diwali 2026.

colors.name: Mountain Jade Green with Stealth Black Roof
River Blue with Stealth Black Roof
Sunset Red with Stealth Black Roof
Pearl White with Stealth Black Roof

variants.name: Duster Authentic 1.0 Turbo MT
variants.notes: Entry trim with 1.0L turbo only. No touchscreen, no alloy wheels, no connected tech. Strong safety kit standard across the range.

variants.name: Duster Evolution 1.0 Turbo MT
keyFeatures: Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto
variants.notes: Evolution 1.0 adds touchscreen, rear camera and alloy wheels over Authentic. No connected car tech.

variants.name: Duster Evolution 1.3 Turbo MT
keyFeatures: Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto
variants.notes: Adds 1.3L TCe 160 to the Evolution trim over the 1.0L option. Same features as Evolution 1.0 Turbo MT.

variants.name: Duster Evolution 1.3 Turbo DCT
keyFeatures: Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto
variants.notes: Adds DCT automatic to the Evolution 1.3L trim. Cooled storage in armrest included with DCT variants.

variants.name: Duster Techno 1.0 Turbo MT
keyFeatures: LED Headlamps with LED Fog Lamps
Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto
Silver Front and Rear Skid Plates
variants.notes: Techno is the mid-spec sweet spot — adds sunroof, push-button start, wireless charging, connected tech and skid plates over Evolution.

variants.name: Duster Techno 1.3 Turbo MT
variants.notes: Techno 1.3L adds the stronger engine to the Techno feature set. No ADAS yet — that comes from Techno Plus upward.

variants.name: Duster Techno 1.3 Turbo DCT
variants.notes: DCT automatic version of Techno 1.3. Gains cooled armrest storage. Highest mileage in the range at 18.45 kmpl ARAI.

variants.name: Duster Techno Plus 1.3 Turbo MT
keyFeatures: Front Side and Rear Parking Sensors
variants.notes: Techno Plus is the first trim with Level 2 ADAS, 360-degree camera, hill descent control, all-round parking sensors, 18-inch wheels and larger digital cluster.

variants.name: Duster Techno Plus 1.3 Turbo DCT
variants.notes: Top Techno Plus option combines Level 2 ADAS with the DCT gearbox. Best equipped automatic below the Iconic.

variants.name: Duster Iconic 1.3 Turbo MT

interior.upholstery: Sage Green Leatherette with Yellow Stitching

keyFeatures: Sage Green Leatherette Seats with Yellow Stitching
Grey Side Garnish and Door Decal
variants.notes: Iconic is the fully loaded trim — adds ventilated seats, powered driver seat, HUD, ambient lighting and Google built-in. Distinctive sage green cabin theme.

variants.name: Duster Iconic 1.3 Turbo DCT

interior.upholstery: Sage Green Leatherette with Yellow Stitching

variants.notes: Iconic DCT is the most feature-rich petrol automatic in the standard lineup. Combines every premium feature with the smooth DCT gearbox.

variants.name: Duster Iconic Launch Edition 1.3 Turbo MT

interior.upholstery: Sage Green Leatherette with Yellow Stitching

keyFeatures: Iconic Launch Edition Exclusive Adventure Styling
variants.notes: Launch Edition is built on the full Iconic spec and adds unique adventure-themed styling touches — yellow accents, blacked alloys and Himalayan garnish. Limited availability.

variants.name: Duster Iconic Launch Edition 1.3 Turbo DCT

interior.upholstery: Sage Green Leatherette with Yellow Stitching

variants.notes: Range-topper at Rs 18.69 lakh. Combines every feature of the Iconic trim with the exclusive Launch Edition adventure styling and DCT gearbox.

variants.name: Duster Techno Plus 1.3 Turbo DT MT
variants.notes: Dual-Tone (DT) variant of Techno Plus MT — same spec as standard Techno Plus MT but priced Rs 20,000 higher for dual-tone roof colour combination.

variants.name: Duster Techno Plus 1.3 Turbo DT DCT
variants.notes: Dual-Tone DCT version of Techno Plus. Adds Rs 20,000 dual-tone roof premium to the standard Techno Plus DCT spec.

variants.name: Duster Iconic 1.3 Turbo DT DCT

interior.upholstery: Sage Green Leatherette with Yellow Stitching

variants.notes: Iconic DT DCT — Iconic fully loaded spec with DCT and the dual-tone black roof colour premium. Priced on par with the Iconic Launch Edition DCT.

blog.title: Renault Duster 2026 review: the comeback that was worth waiting for
blog.subtitle: Turbo punch, rugged French character, a 5-star safety score and a 7-year warranty — the new Duster means business.
blog.summary: The 2026 Renault Duster represents one of the most anticipated comebacks in the Indian car market. Built on the modern CMF-B platform, it brings two punchy turbo engines, a well-structured trim ladder, segment-first safety credentials and a design that stays true to the Duster's adventurous spirit. It earned a 5-star Bharat NCAP rating in April 2026.

sections.heading: Design and road presence
body: The 2026 Duster trades Renault's diamond logo for a bold 'DUSTER' moniker on the grille, a design choice that instantly makes the car a statement. The front features LED headlights with eyebrow-shaped DRLs, muscular skid plates, and generous body cladding that hints at its off-road heritage.

Higher trims ride on 18-inch dual-tone alloys, and the Iconic variant adds distinctive grey side garnish and door decals. The Iconic Launch Edition adds an adventure-inspired yellow accent package unique in the segment.

sections.heading: Engines and variants
body: The Duster is offered with two turbo-petrol engines across 16 variants and 6 trims. The entry 1.0L TCe 100 (100 PS / 166 Nm) powers the Authentic, Evolution and Techno trims with a 6-speed manual only. The stronger 1.3L TCe 160 (163 PS / 280 Nm) — the most powerful 1.3L in the segment — is available from Evolution upward with manual and 6-speed DCT options.
A 1.8L strong hybrid powertrain is confirmed for Diwali 2026, promising 80 percent electric city running.

sections.heading: Interior, comfort and features
body: The cabin is thoughtfully tiered. Authentic and Evolution get a 7-inch TFT cluster, while Techno Plus and above gain a 10.25-inch display. The Iconic introduces distinctive sage green leatherette seats with yellow stitching, ventilated front seats, a powered driver seat, head-up display, and ambient lighting.

Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto are available from the Evolution trim up. Google built-in (Maps, Play, Assistant) is exclusive to the Iconic and Iconic Launch Edition. The panoramic sunroof arrives from the Techno trim and is the first in its class at this price point.

sections.heading: Safety and ADAS
body: Six airbags, ESC, TCS, cornering stability control, hill start assist and ISOFIX are standard across all variants — a notable commitment at this segment. The Duster became the first Renault in India to offer Level-2 ADAS, available from the Techno Plus trim up, with 17 features including adaptive cruise control, lane keep assist, blind spot monitoring and auto emergency braking.
In April 2026, the new Duster earned a 5-star Bharat NCAP safety rating with strong scores in both adult and child occupant protection.

pros: 1.3L TCe 160 is the most powerful 1.3L in the compact SUV segment
Level-2 ADAS available from Techno Plus
Panoramic sunroof available from mid-spec Techno
Strong French design identity with Duster heritage
cons: No 4WD option at launch — strictly FWD across all variants
Authentic trim lacks touchscreen and rear camera
blog.verdict: The 2026 Renault Duster is a well-rounded compact SUV that earns its place through safety credibility, punchy turbocharged performance, a feature-packed cabin and a compelling warranty. Techno 1.3 MT and Techno DCT offer the best value in the mid-range; Techno Plus is for buyers who want Level-2 ADAS without paying flagship prices.

faqs.question: How many variants does the 2026 Renault Duster have?
faqs.answer: This file contains 16 variants across 6 trims: Authentic (1), Evolution (3), Techno (3), Techno Plus (4), Iconic (3), and Iconic Launch Edition (2).

faqs.question: Does the Renault Duster 2026 have ADAS?
faqs.answer: Yes. Level-2 ADAS with 17 features is available from the Techno Plus trim upward, making it the first Renault in India to offer Level-2 ADAS.

faqs.question: Does the Renault Duster 2026 have 4WD?
faqs.answer: No. The 2026 Duster launched in India is strictly FWD across all variants. Renault has not confirmed a 4WD option for the Indian market at this stage.

faqs.question: What is the warranty on the Renault Duster 2026?
faqs.answer: Renault offers a 7-year / 1,50,000 km standard warranty on the Duster — a segment-first in India.

faqs.question: What is the Bharat NCAP safety rating of the Renault Duster 2026?
faqs.answer: The 2026 Renault Duster earned a 5-Star Bharat NCAP safety rating in April 2026 with strong adult and child occupant protection scores.

metadata.notes: Structure mirrors fortuner.json exactly. 16 variants are defined as: 13 unique powertrain variants + 3 Dual-Tone (DT) colour-premium variants (Techno Plus DT MT, Techno Plus DT DCT, Iconic DT DCT). DT variants share specs with standard counterparts but carry a Rs 20,000 dual-tone roof premium. Prices are ex-showroom pan-India introductory at launch (March 2026); recheck against city/dealer before publishing final on-road values. The 1.8L strong hybrid is expected to launch by Diwali 2026 and is not included in this file.
